season_info.title: Season Information
season_info.description: Sugarcane requires high nutrition, regular irrigation, and proper earthing up for high cane yield.

location_note.title: Local Variation Note
location_note.message: Commercial crop management should be adjusted for local variety, irrigation, and market duration.

items.unit: kg/ha for Tamil Nadu plant crop
kg/ha for Tamil Nadu plant crop
kg/ha for Tamil Nadu plant crop
kg/ha gypsum in sulphur deficient soils

fertilizer_section.title: Recommended Inputs
micronutrients: Sulphur or zinc if deficiency is observed

season_advice.title: Season Guidance
season_advice.rainy_season: Ensure drainage and timely weed control.
season_advice.dry_season: Irrigate at critical growth stages to avoid yield loss.
season_advice.winter_season: Cool season conditions may favor select commercial crops under irrigation.

application_section.title: Application Method
application_section.frequency: P basal; N and K in 3 splits at 30, 60 and 90 days

water_management.title: Water Management
tips: Prevent water stagnation in the root zone

warnings.title: Important Warnings
points: Do not delay nutrient application beyond critical stages

events.activity: Top dressing, gap filling, and earthing up
